landing.title: Understand 5,000 Years of History in 2 Hours.
landing.subtitle: Not dates. Not memorization. Just the story of how our world came to be.

feature1.title: 11 Major Eras
feature1.description: From Ancient Civilizations to the AI Era

feature2.title: Deep Insights
feature2.description: Understand the forces that shaped our world

landing.designedFor: Designed for complete beginners. No prior knowledge required.

step1.title: Scroll Through Eras
step1.desc: Explore 11 major periods from ancient civilizations to today

step2.title: Deep Dive
step2.desc: Learn the background, catalysts, and consequences of each era

step3.title: Active Recall
step3.desc: Test your understanding with built-in exercises

step4.title: Frameworks
step4.desc: View history through technology, power, economy, and ideas

landing.quote: The only thing we learn from history is that we learn nothing from history.
landing.quoteAttribution: — Except when you learn with History Sense ✨
landing.footer: Understand the past. Navigate the future.

timeline.title: The Journey Through Time
timeline.description: Scroll through 11 major eras that shaped human civilization. Each card reveals a key turning point in history.

recall.prompt: Summarize this era in one sentence.
recall.optional: This exercise is optional. No grading.

sequence.title: Sequence Challenge
sequence.instructions: Arrange the following events in chronological order:

finish.title: Congratulations! You've Completed the Journey
finish.description: You've explored 5,000 years of human history. Here's what you've learned:
finish.reflectionText: History is not just about dates and events—it's about understanding how we got here. The patterns you've identified will help you make sense of the world today.

framework.title: Historical Frameworks
framework.description: View history through different lenses to gain deeper understanding
framework.technologyDescription: How technology has shaped human civilization
framework.powerDescription: The evolution of political power structures
